summary: Iteration 14 — Conversational Execution Architecture (Cortex plan→launch-in-background→conversation continues). 12/12 backend tests PASS for the new /api/cortex/missions/active, /{id}, /{id}/events endpoints and the /console/execute followup behaviour (launch_seller_mission, run_bulk_outreach, autonomy=1 queued path, persistence in cortex_conversations). Frontend conversational rail flow verified end-to-end after fixing a P0 frontend regression (phaseHistory state was undefined and crashed CommandCenter on every send).

ui_bugs.issue: P0 REGRESSION (FIXED): `phaseHistory` / `setPhaseHistory` referenced but never declared via useState. Every message send triggered 'Uncaught ReferenceError: phaseHistory is not defined' + 'setPhaseHistory is not defined', tearing down the chat (whole conversational flow broken — no plan render, no launch, no followup). Patched by adding `const [phaseHistory, setPhaseHistory] = useState([]);` next to existing `phase` state.

action_items: Confirm the phaseHistory useState fix shipped in CommandCenter.jsx is correct (it is; same shape used by existing rendering code at lines 351/378/565). No further action required unless the main agent wants to also auto-bake recent-phase history visibility (currently empty array start).

MissionEventStream component was not visible in the chat thread during testing because none of the 6 active missions have ANY mission_events / seller_outreach_events rows yet (verified via /events endpoint — 0 events on all 6 missions). This is expected per spec ('when mission_events exist…'). For a future live test the agent should seed a mission_event row to verify the inline live-updates rendering visually.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (fixed by testing agent): CommandCenter.jsx referenced phaseHistory/setPhaseHistory without declaring the useState — this is a hard crash and trivially preventable with a lint rule (no-undef). Recommend turning on ESLint no-undef for the dashboard tree.

CommandCenter.jsx continues to grow (now likely 700+ lines after iter14 conversational additions). Time to extract ChatMessage, MissionEventStream-host, Composer, PhaseIndicator into co-located files under /pages/dashboard/cortex/.

Active-mission tiles show 'L#' autonomy but the rail mixes 'L0/9' (current/target) with 'L3' (autonomy) — visually ambiguous on small widths. Consider labeling autonomy chip as 'AUTONOMY L3' or moving it to a clear chip slot.

Active missions endpoint sorts by created_at desc — fine — but the `limit` cap of 20 + always 6-default may hide newer launches once the user exceeds 6 active. Acceptable trade-off, but consider an 'X more →' affordance.

_last_action() in cortex_active_missions.py returns from the FIRST collection that has any matching row — so once mission_events has any tick, seller_outreach_events is never inspected. If outreach events are typically more recent than mission heartbeats, the rail will appear stale. Consider merging both collections by created_at and picking the max.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical conversational flow after the phaseHistory fix

seed_data_creation: None — relied on the 6 pre-existing active missions seeded by prior iterations. No mission_events rows exist for any of them (verified).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 = conversational-execution architecture. Backend exposes /api/cortex/missions/active, /{id}, /{id}/events and execute now returns a `followup` object that frontend renders inline as a new chat-cortex-turn. The user STAYS on /dashboard after launch (no nav-away). Polling: active missions every ~5000ms (verified), per-mission events every 8000ms. To visually verify MissionEventStream, seed a row into `mission_events` for one of the user's active missions (e.g. {user_id:'user_test1779636592168', mission_id:'<any active id>', event:'discovered_lead', body:'Found new ceramic seller', created_at:<now>}). NOTE: testing agent fixed a P0 crash where CommandCenter.jsx used phaseHistory without declaring useState — verify still in place.

backend_pytest.test_execute_launch_seller_mission_follo: PASS (followup contains 'Mission launched', 'Discovery', premium, high-volume, region)
backend_pytest.test_execute_bulk_outreach_followup: PASS (followup references A/B test + throttle + audit)
backend_pytest.test_execute_queued_followup_starts_with: PASS (autonomy=1 → action_taken=queued, followup starts 'Plan queued for approval')
backend_pytest.test_execute_followup_persisted_in_conve: PASS (followup turn lands in cortex_conversations with intent=followup)

frontend_flows.MissionEventStream renders inline when e: NOT VERIFIED VISUALLY (no mission_events rows seeded; component code present per files_of_reference and chat rendering pipeline imports it). Endpoint behaviour verified backend-side.
